= Collapsible Test

== Delimited collapsible

.Click to expand
[%collapsible]
====
Hidden content revealed on click.

A second paragraph inside the collapsible.

== Open by default

.Initially open
[%collapsible%open]
====
This block starts expanded.

== Without a title

[%collapsible]
====
Summary defaults to "Details" when no title is given.
